summary: Projects (Projekte/Projeler) module tested end-to-end. Backend pytest: 13/13 PASS (new /app/backend/tests/test_projects.py covering CRUD + EUR/TRY/USD currencies, invalid customer 400, incomes/expenses with installment payments, initial_payment inside expense create, summary math (amount 500000, income 100000 -> receivable 400000; expense debt 100000 -> profit 400000; payments 50000+20000 -> paid 70000/remaining 30000/2 payments; delete payment recalculates), CASCADE delete of incomes+expenses on project delete (GET after delete -> 404), RBAC (sales default allowed; after admin removes 'sales' from projects_visible_roles -> 403 while admin stays 200; setting persists), UPLOAD flow (POST /api/uploads with PNG returns url; GET /api/uploads/file/<name> returns 200 with PNG bytes), and the CRITICAL SEPARATION check (creating project income+expense does NOT change /api/accounting stats totals or list count). Frontend Playwright: admin login OK; sidebar shows 'Projekte' link (DE). Detail page loads with correct data-testids sum-amount/sum-income/sum-receivable/sum-profit showing €500.000,00 / €0,00 / €500.000,00 / €500.000,00 for a 500k EUR project. Adding income 100.000 via add-income-btn -> income-dialog -> income-amount-input -> save-income-btn correctly updates sum-income to €100.000,00 and sum-receivable to €400.000,00. Adding expense 'Mobilyacı' 100.000 with initial_payment 50.000 via add-expense-btn -> save-expense-btn creates 1 expense row (expense-row-<id>) and profit becomes €400.000,00 (500k - 100k debt). Clicking the expense row opens expense-detail-dialog; payment-amount-input + save-payment-btn accepts a 20.000 payment; payment rows and delete-payment-<id> handles appear. Accounting page (/muhasebe) confirmed UNAFFECTED after project income/expense adds: sum-income/sum-expense/sum-net all still €0,00 — separation VERIFIED. Settings /ayarlar tab-access shows both access-proj-sales-switch and access-proj-muhasebe-switch. No i18n key leaks (regex /projects\.[a-zA-Z_]+/ returned empty on DE list AND DE detail pages). edit-project-<id> and delete-project-<id> buttons render in the list.
action_items: OPTIONAL: The expenses-section header displays 'Offener Rest' (summary.expense_remaining_total) correctly, and I added the missing data-testid="expense-remaining-total" to the <b> element in /app/frontend/src/pages/ProjeDetay.jsx line 197 so future automation can assert it. No functional change.

OPTIONAL: On the /projeler list, the 'Add Project' sheet initially opened but the first save-project-btn attempt returned 422 in one Playwright run — root cause was the customer select option needing an extra ~300ms settle time (per your own dialog note). Second attempt with API-created project worked. Consider bumping the internal wait after opening project-customer-select, or auto-focusing the first option, to make the UI resilient to fast-typing test bots. Users are unlikely to hit this.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/projects.py: Clean separation — uses its own collections `projects`, `project_incomes`, `project_expenses`; never writes to `transactions`. Verified by TestSeparationFromAccounting (accounting stats & rowcount unchanged after project income/expense create).

ensure_access: admin always allowed; other roles gated by settings.projects_visible_roles (default [admin,sales,muhasebe]). Returns 403 with a localized message. Matches Sidebar.jsx & Projeler.jsx gating (verified switch persistence via /api/settings PUT/GET).
delete_project cascades incomes+expenses via delete_many BEFORE removing the project doc — good ordering. Verified GET returns 404 after delete.

_expense_totals computes paid = sum(payments.amount), remaining = total_debt - paid, payments_count = len(payments). All rounded to 2 decimals. Consistent between add_expense, update_expense, add_payment, and delete_payment responses.

get_project_detail returns summary block with amount/income_total/remaining_receivable/expense_debt_total/expense_paid_total/expense_remaining_total/profit — all math verified end-to-end for 500k project + 100k income + 100k expense with 50k+20k payments.
uploads endpoint returns an absolute URL (BASE_URL + /api/uploads/file/<name>) — frontend can consume directly; file is served with correct content bytes (verified PNG signature 0x89 P N G).
MINOR (already fixed by me): /app/frontend/src/pages/ProjeDetay.jsx line 197 was missing data-testid="expense-remaining-total" — added; no logic change.
test_credentials: admin@arigastro.com / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). RBAC pytest creates+deletes a TEST_ sales user dynamically.
seed_data_creation: All test data (TEST_-prefixed projects, incomes, expenses, payments, TEST_ProjCust customer, TEST_ sales user) is created and deleted within each test's try/finally or fixture teardown. Manual Playwright cleanup at the end: deleted TEST_PW_Projekt_A project via API — preview is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest split: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (auth/users/customers/quotes/settings/accounting) and /app/backend/tests/test_projects.py (projects module). Both use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env. Projects RBAC test toggles settings.projects_visible_roles and restores in finally. Frontend: language switcher is at sidebar bottom (button 'Deutsch' / 'Türkisch' opens a menu with 'Deutsch'/'Türkisch' items). project detail testids: sum-amount, sum-income, sum-receivable, sum-profit, add-income-btn, income-dialog, income-amount-input, save-income-btn, add-expense-btn, expense-name-input, expense-debt-input, expense-pay-amount-input, save-expense-btn, expense-row-<id>, expense-detail-dialog, payment-amount-input, save-payment-btn, delete-payment-<id>, expense-remaining-total (added by me). List page testids: new-project-btn, project-customer-select, project-name-input, project-amount-input, project-currency-select, project-info-input, save-project-btn, project-name-<id>, edit-project-<id>, delete-project-<id>. Settings tab-access: access-proj-sales-switch, access-proj-muhasebe-switch.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found. One minor testability gap (missing data-testid on the expense-remaining-total header value) was fixed in ProjeDetay.jsx. Everything else works as specified: money calculations, cascade delete, accounting-module separation, receipt upload/serve, DE/TR i18n without key leaks, and role-based access via Settings.
